notes: Defaults for the voyage-economics calculator and the floating-storage estimator. All user-adjustable in the UI; these are the sourced starting points.

hull_value_musd.source: Modern VLCC secondhand values — public sale-and-purchase broker commentary

freight_per_bbl.source: Baltic TD3C (MEG→China) equivalents, public commentary; crisis chartering has spiked rates 3×+

ships.source: 150+ ships reported holding outside the strait, mid-July 2026

avg_cargo_mbbl.source: Fleet-mix estimate (VLCC 2.0 / Suezmax 1.0 / Aframax 0.7 M bbl)
